name: Propagate active ScriptOrModule with JobCallback Record
Structs: Fixed Layout Objects and Some Synchronization Primitives
Change `Number.parseInt`/`parseFloat` to not coerce `null`/`undefined`/`NaN` (repo link TBD)
Built In Modules (aka JS Standard Library)
Wavy Dot: Syntactic Support for Promise Pipelining
Legacy reflection features for functions in JavaScript
Deep Path Properties in Record Literals
Restrict subclassing support in built-in methods
RegExp v flag with set notation + properties of strings
Ergonomic brand checks for Private Fields

Class Fields ([Private instance methods and accessors][private-methods], [Class Public Instance Fields & Private Instance Fields][class-fields], [Static class fields and private static methods][static-class-features])
Trailing commas in function parameter lists and calls
Callable class constructors
rationale: can be solved with decorators

name: `{Set,Map}.prototype.toJSON`
rationale: better solved by a custom replacer function.

name: Typed Objects
rationale: waiting for WebAssembly requirements to become clearer

name: Proposed Grammar change to ES Modules
rationale: No consensus on this specific solution.

name: Dynamic Module Reform
rationale: we decided to preserve the current semantics

name: SIMD.JS - SIMD APIs
rationale: Stage 1: Start with SIMD in WASM; implementations not pursuing SIMD.js for now.

name: Updates to Tail Calls to include an explicit syntactic opt-in
`Builtins.typeOf()` and `Builtins.is()`
rationale: can be solved in other ways

name: Tagged Collection Literals
rationale: pursuing `when new` syntax and other alternatives

name: `Date.parse` fallback semantics
rationale: likely replaced by [uniform parsing of quasi-standard `Date.parse` input][uniform-date-parse]

name: Distinguishing literal strings
rationale: [Trusted Types](https://github.com/w3c/webappsec-trusted-types) no longer a dependent

name: Annex B — HTML Attribute Event Handlers
rationale: per [PR comment](https://github.com/tc39/ecma262/issues/1595#issuecomment-509348434)

name: Normative ICU Reference
rationale: champion is no longer participating in TC39

name: Zones
rationale: champion is no longer participating in TC39

name: Blöcks
rationale: champion is no longer participating in TC39

name: RegExp Atomic Groups & Possessive Quantifiers
rationale: Never presented; engines are not interested in the feature, mainly because it doesn't solve backtracking for most users

name: RefCollection
rationale: replaced with [Symbols as WeakMap keys][symbols-weakmap]; also there were OCAP/membrane concerns around providing a globally available pre-instantiated RefCollection

name: Generic Comparison
rationale: replaced with [Array Equality][array-equality]

name: TypedArray stride parameter
rationale: concern about performance implications, and the proposal is not expressive enough

name: Unused Function Parameters
rationale: the need to solve the problem does not outweigh the hazards

name: Improving iteration on Objects
rationale: concern about need for such an API

name: `ArrayBuffer.prototype.transfer`
rationale: superseded by [Resizable Buffers][resizable-buffers]

name: Function helpers
rationale: Presented and rejected before Stage 1 on 2021-10; split up into multiple subsequent proposals

name: `"use module"`
rationale: champion does not wish to pursue

name: Function.pipe and flow
rationale: rejected for stage 1

name: `Symbol.thenable`
rationale: changing thenability on Module Namespace objects is not web compatible, and allowing non-Promise use of "then" is not worth slowing down all Promise operations

name: WeakRefs `cleanupSome`
rationale: subsumed by WebAssembly JS Promise Integration, which avoids the long task issue

name: JSON.tryParse
rationale: some deemed this too specific a solution for a generalized language-wide problem

name: UUID
rationale: moved to `crypto.randomUUID()` in February 2023

name: `Math` Extensions
rationale: no interested champions in February 2024

name: Generator arrow functions
rationale: no interested champions in February 2024

name: `Math.signbit`: IEEE-754 sign bit
rationale: no interested champions in February 2024

name: Getting last element of Array
rationale: the [Array#at](https://github.com/tc39/proposal-relative-indexing-method) proposal supersedes this work.

name: Sequence properties in Unicode property escapes
rationale: subsumed by [RegExp v flag with set notation + properties of strings][regexp-v-flag] proposal

name: Record & Tuple
rationale: subsumed by [Composites][composite]

name: Dynamic Import Host Adjustment
rationale: no longer being pursued.

name: isTemplateObject
rationale: lack of implementer need/interest, as well as same vs cross realm concerns

name: Time Zone Canonicalization
rationale: Reached Stage 3 in July 2023, then was merged into [Temporal][temporal]

name: Keep trailing zeros in Intl.NumberFormat and Intl.PluralRules
explore associating a unit with a number
Default Behaviours for some Intl APIs
Intl.UnitFormat
rationale: deprecated in favor of [Unified Intl.NumberFormat](https://github.com/tc39/proposal-unified-intl-numberformat?tab=readme-ov-file#i-units)
